---
title: "Diagnostics spatiaux — Bassin SLSO"
author: "meandre"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
execute:
  warning: false
  echo: true
---

# Diagnostics spatiaux du modèle YHydro

Ce notebook charge le modèle entraîné, simule en mode diagnostique (débit naturalisé,
sans prélèvements), puis cartographie les champs hydrologiques distribués : ETR, recharge,
ruissellement latéral, neige, etc.

## 1. Configuration et chargement

```{python}
#| label: setup
import os
import tomllib
from pathlib import Path

import duckdb
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import torch
import xarray as xr

os.environ["PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF"] = "expandable_segments:True"

from meandre.data.basin_cache import BasinCache
from meandre.data.gridded_forcing import extract_forcing
from meandre.model import YHydro
from meandre.routing.withdrawals import WithdrawalData
from meandre.utils.state import HydroState

device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
print(f"Device : {device}")
```

```{python}
#| label: load-config
# Charger la configuration
CONFIG = Path("notebooks/slso/config/slso.toml")
with open(CONFIG, "rb") as f:
    cfg = tomllib.load(f)

paths = cfg["paths"]
temporal = cfg["temporal"]
mcfg = cfg["model"]
```

```{python}
#| label: load-basin
# Charger les données du bassin
cache = BasinCache(paths["basin_db"])
hydro = cache.load(device=device)

graph = hydro["graph"]
territorial = hydro["territorial"]
node_coords = hydro["node_coords"]
n_nodes = hydro["n_nodes"]

print(f"Noeuds : {n_nodes}")
print(f"Arêtes : {graph.n_edges}")
```

```{python}
#| label: load-forcing
# Période diagnostique : on utilise 2 ans de validation pour éviter les OOM
# (return_diagnostics=True conserve tous les champs en mémoire)
DIAG_START = "2010-01-01"
DIAG_END   = "2011-12-31"

forcing = extract_forcing(
    zarr_path=paths["weather_grid"],
    node_coords=node_coords,
    node_elev=None,
    date_start=temporal["date_start"],
    date_end=temporal["date_end"],
    cache_nc=paths["forcing_cache"],
    device=device,
)

# Dates et jour de l'année
ds_time = xr.open_dataset(paths["forcing_cache"])
all_dates = ds_time.time.sel(
    time=slice(temporal["date_start"], temporal["date_end"])
).values
ds_time.close()

dates_pd = pd.DatetimeIndex(all_dates)
doy = torch.tensor(dates_pd.dayofyear.values, dtype=torch.long, device=device)

print(f"Forçage total : {forcing.shape} ({all_dates[0]} à {all_dates[-1]})")
```

```{python}
#| label: load-model
# Charger le modèle entraîné
model = YHydro(
    n_nodes=n_nodes,
    n_territorial=territorial.n_features,
    n_forcing=mcfg["n_forcing"],
    context_window=mcfg["context_window"],
    residual_history=mcfg["residual_history"],
    max_travel_time=mcfg["max_travel_days"],
    use_temporal=True,
    use_residual=True,
    use_travel_time_attn=True,
    use_temperature=True,
    dropout=mcfg.get("dropout", 0.0),
    param_mode=mcfg.get("param_mode", "nerf"),
).to(device)

ckpt_path = Path(paths["checkpoint"])
model.load(str(ckpt_path))
model.eval()

n_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
print(f"Checkpoint : {ckpt_path}")
print(f"Paramètres : {n_params:,}")
```

## 2. Simulation diagnostique

On simule avec zéro prélèvements (débit naturalisé) et `return_diagnostics=True`
pour obtenir les champs spatialisés jour par jour.

Le spinup couvre 2000-01-01 à 2009-12-31 (avant la période diagnostique).
On ne conserve les diagnostics que pour la fenêtre 2010–2011 pour limiter la mémoire.

```{python}
#| label: simulate
# Indices temporels
days = all_dates.astype("datetime64[D]")
diag_start_idx = int(np.searchsorted(days, np.datetime64(DIAG_START, "D")))
diag_end_idx = int(np.searchsorted(days, np.datetime64(DIAG_END, "D"), side="right"))

print(f"Période diagnostique : {DIAG_START} à {DIAG_END}")
print(f"  indices [{diag_start_idx}:{diag_end_idx}] sur {len(days)} jours total")

# Phase 1 : spinup (sans diagnostics) pour initialiser l'état
print("Spinup en cours...")
with torch.no_grad():
    Q_spinup, spinup_state = model.simulate(
        forcing=forcing[:diag_start_idx],
        initial_state=HydroState.zeros(n_nodes, device=device),
        graph=graph,
        node_coords=node_coords,
        territorial=territorial,
        withdrawals=WithdrawalData.empty(n_nodes),
        day_of_year=doy[:diag_start_idx],
        return_diagnostics=False,
    )
del Q_spinup
torch.cuda.empty_cache() if device.type == "cuda" else None

# Phase 2 : simulation diagnostique
print("Simulation diagnostique en cours...")
with torch.no_grad():
    Q_sim, final_state, diag = model.simulate(
        forcing=forcing[diag_start_idx:diag_end_idx],
        initial_state=spinup_state,
        graph=graph,
        node_coords=node_coords,
        territorial=territorial,
        withdrawals=WithdrawalData.empty(n_nodes),
        day_of_year=doy[diag_start_idx:diag_end_idx],
        return_diagnostics=True,
    )

diag_dates = pd.date_range(DIAG_START, DIAG_END, freq="D")
n_diag_days = Q_sim.shape[0]
print(f"Simulation terminée : {n_diag_days} jours, {n_nodes} noeuds")
print(f"Champs diagnostiques : {list(diag.to_dict().keys())}")
```

## 3. Bilan hydrique annuel

Bilan moyen annuel (mm/an) sur l'ensemble des noeuds.

```{python}
#| label: tbl-water-balance
#| tbl-cap: "Bilan hydrique annuel moyen (mm/an) — période diagnostique"

# Extraire les moyennes spatiales (mm/jour → mm/an × 365.25)
fields_mm = {
    "ETP": diag.etp,
    "ETR": diag.etr,
    "Fonte neige": diag.snowmelt,
    "Ruissellement lat.": diag.lateral_mm,
    "Recharge": diag.recharge,
    "Débit de base": diag.q_baseflow,
}

n_years = n_diag_days / 365.25
rows = []
for name, tensor in fields_mm.items():
    t = tensor.cpu().numpy()
    # Moyenne spatiale par jour, puis total annuel
    daily_mean = t.mean(axis=1)  # moyenne sur les noeuds
    total = float(daily_mean.sum() / n_years)
    spatial_std = float(t.sum(axis=0).mean() / n_years)  # variabilité inter-noeuds
    rows.append({"Variable": name, "Moyenne (mm/an)": f"{total:.0f}",
                 "Min noeud (mm/an)": f"{t.sum(axis=0).min() / n_years:.0f}",
                 "Max noeud (mm/an)": f"{t.sum(axis=0).max() / n_years:.0f}"})

df_balance = pd.DataFrame(rows)
df_balance
```

## 4. Cartes spatiales

Cartes des champs moyens annuels sur le bassin SLSO.

```{python}
#| label: fig-spatial-maps
#| fig-cap: "Champs hydrologiques moyens annuels (mm/an) — SLSO 2010–2011"

lon = node_coords[:, 0].cpu().numpy()
lat = node_coords[:, 1].cpu().numpy()

# Calcul des moyennes annuelles par noeud (mm/jour → mm/an)
etr_annual = diag.etr.cpu().numpy().sum(axis=0) / n_years
recharge_annual = diag.recharge.cpu().numpy().sum(axis=0) / n_years
lateral_annual = diag.lateral_mm.cpu().numpy().sum(axis=0) / n_years
snowmelt_annual = diag.snowmelt.cpu().numpy().sum(axis=0) / n_years
baseflow_annual = diag.q_baseflow.cpu().numpy().sum(axis=0) / n_years
etp_annual = diag.etp.cpu().numpy().sum(axis=0) / n_years

fields = [
    ("ETR (mm/an)", etr_annual, "YlGn"),
    ("ETP (mm/an)", etp_annual, "YlOrRd"),
    ("Recharge (mm/an)", recharge_annual, "Blues"),
    ("Ruissellement latéral (mm/an)", lateral_annual, "PuBu"),
    ("Fonte de neige (mm/an)", snowmelt_annual, "cool"),
    ("Débit de base (mm/an)", baseflow_annual, "GnBu"),
]

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 3, figsize=(18, 11))
for ax, (title, values, cmap) in zip(axes.flat, fields):
    sc = ax.scatter(lon, lat, c=values, s=3, cmap=cmap, edgecolors="none")
    ax.set_title(title, fontsize=12)
    ax.set_xlabel("Longitude")
    ax.set_ylabel("Latitude")
    ax.set_aspect("equal")
    plt.colorbar(sc, ax=ax, shrink=0.7)

fig.suptitle(f"Bassin SLSO — Moyennes annuelles ({DIAG_START} à {DIAG_END})",
             fontsize=14, fontweight="bold")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-deficit-map
#| fig-cap: "Déficit hydrique (ETP - ETR) et ratio ETR/ETP"

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5.5))

# Déficit
deficit = etp_annual - etr_annual
sc1 = axes[0].scatter(lon, lat, c=deficit, s=3, cmap="RdYlBu_r", edgecolors="none")
axes[0].set_title("Déficit hydrique ETP − ETR (mm/an)")
axes[0].set_xlabel("Longitude")
axes[0].set_ylabel("Latitude")
axes[0].set_aspect("equal")
plt.colorbar(sc1, ax=axes[0], shrink=0.7)

# Ratio ETR/ETP
ratio = np.where(etp_annual > 0, etr_annual / etp_annual, 0)
sc2 = axes[1].scatter(lon, lat, c=ratio, s=3, cmap="RdYlGn", vmin=0, vmax=1,
                       edgecolors="none")
axes[1].set_title("Ratio ETR / ETP (–)")
axes[1].set_xlabel("Longitude")
axes[1].set_ylabel("Latitude")
axes[1].set_aspect("equal")
plt.colorbar(sc2, ax=axes[1], shrink=0.7)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

## 5. Séries temporelles

### Débit simulé à l'exutoire

```{python}
#| label: fig-discharge-outlet
#| fig-cap: "Débit simulé (naturalisé) à l'exutoire — SLSO 2010–2011"

# L'exutoire est le dernier noeud dans l'ordre topologique
outlet_idx = graph.order[-1].item() if hasattr(graph, 'order') else 0

q_outlet = Q_sim[:, outlet_idx].cpu().numpy()

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 4))
ax.plot(diag_dates[:n_diag_days], q_outlet, color="steelblue", linewidth=0.8)
ax.set_ylabel("Débit (m³/s)")
ax.set_xlabel("Date")
ax.set_title(f"Débit naturalisé à l'exutoire (noeud {outlet_idx})")
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

### Moyennes spatiales des flux verticaux

```{python}
#| label: fig-timeseries-fluxes
#| fig-cap: "Séries temporelles des flux verticaux moyens sur le bassin (mm/jour)"

fig, axes = plt.subplots(4, 1, figsize=(14, 12), sharex=True)

# ETR vs ETP
axes[0].plot(diag_dates[:n_diag_days], diag.etp.cpu().numpy().mean(axis=1),
             color="orange", linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.8, label="ETP")
axes[0].plot(diag_dates[:n_diag_days], diag.etr.cpu().numpy().mean(axis=1),
             color="green", linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.8, label="ETR")
axes[0].set_ylabel("mm/jour")
axes[0].set_title("Évapotranspiration")
axes[0].legend()
axes[0].grid(True, alpha=0.3)

# Fonte de neige
axes[1].plot(diag_dates[:n_diag_days], diag.snowmelt.cpu().numpy().mean(axis=1),
             color="deepskyblue", linewidth=0.6)
axes[1].set_ylabel("mm/jour")
axes[1].set_title("Fonte de neige")
axes[1].grid(True, alpha=0.3)

# Recharge et débit de base
axes[2].plot(diag_dates[:n_diag_days], diag.recharge.cpu().numpy().mean(axis=1),
             color="royalblue", linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.8, label="Recharge")
axes[2].plot(diag_dates[:n_diag_days], diag.q_baseflow.cpu().numpy().mean(axis=1),
             color="darkgreen", linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.8, label="Débit de base")
axes[2].set_ylabel("mm/jour")
axes[2].set_title("Recharge et débit de base")
axes[2].legend()
axes[2].grid(True, alpha=0.3)

# Ruissellement latéral
axes[3].plot(diag_dates[:n_diag_days], diag.lateral_mm.cpu().numpy().mean(axis=1),
             color="purple", linewidth=0.6)
axes[3].set_ylabel("mm/jour")
axes[3].set_title("Ruissellement latéral")
axes[3].set_xlabel("Date")
axes[3].grid(True, alpha=0.3)

fig.suptitle("Flux verticaux — moyenne spatiale sur le bassin SLSO",
             fontsize=13, fontweight="bold")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

### Température de l'eau (si disponible)

```{python}
#| label: fig-temperature
#| fig-cap: "Température de l'eau simulée à l'exutoire"

if diag.T_water is not None:
    t_water_outlet = diag.T_water[:, outlet_idx].cpu().numpy()

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 3.5))
    ax.plot(diag_dates[:n_diag_days], t_water_outlet, color="firebrick", linewidth=0.7)
    ax.set_ylabel("Température (°C)")
    ax.set_xlabel("Date")
    ax.set_title(f"Température de l'eau — exutoire (noeud {outlet_idx})")
    ax.axhline(0, color="gray", linestyle="--", linewidth=0.5)
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
else:
    print("Module de température désactivé — pas de données T_water.")
```

## 6. Export NetCDF

Sauvegarde de tous les champs diagnostiques dans un fichier NetCDF pour
analyses ultérieures (SIG, comparaison inter-modèles, etc.).

```{python}
#| label: export-netcdf

# Construire le dataset xarray
coords_dict = {
    "time": diag_dates[:n_diag_days],
    "node": np.arange(n_nodes),
}

data_vars = {}

# Débit simulé
data_vars["Q_sim"] = (["time", "node"], Q_sim.cpu().numpy(), {
    "units": "m3/s",
    "long_name": "Débit simulé naturalisé",
})

# Champs diagnostiques
long_names = {
    "etp": "Évapotranspiration potentielle",
    "etr": "Évapotranspiration réelle",
    "snowmelt": "Fonte de neige",
    "lateral_mm": "Ruissellement latéral",
    "recharge": "Recharge de la nappe",
    "q_baseflow": "Débit de base",
    "q_lateral": "Apport latéral",
    "q_upstream": "Apport amont",
    "T_water": "Température de l'eau",
}

for name, tensor in diag.to_dict().items():
    data_vars[name] = (
        ["time", "node"],
        tensor.cpu().numpy(),
        {"units": diag.units[name], "long_name": long_names.get(name, name)},
    )

# Coordonnées géographiques des noeuds
data_vars["lon"] = (["node"], lon, {"units": "degrees_east", "long_name": "Longitude"})
data_vars["lat"] = (["node"], lat, {"units": "degrees_north", "long_name": "Latitude"})

ds = xr.Dataset(data_vars=data_vars, coords=coords_dict)
ds.attrs["title"] = "Diagnostics spatiaux YHydro — Bassin SLSO"
ds.attrs["source"] = f"meandre, checkpoint: {ckpt_path.name}"
ds.attrs["period"] = f"{DIAG_START} à {DIAG_END}"
ds.attrs["mode"] = "Débit naturalisé (zéro prélèvements)"
ds.attrs["history"] = f"Créé le {pd.Timestamp.now().isoformat()}"

# Sauvegarder
output_nc = Path("notebooks/slso/results/diagnostics.nc")
output_nc.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
ds.to_netcdf(output_nc, engine="netcdf4")
print(f"NetCDF exporté : {output_nc} ({output_nc.stat().st_size / 1e6:.1f} Mo)")
print(f"Variables : {list(ds.data_vars)}")
print(f"Dimensions : time={ds.sizes['time']}, node={ds.sizes['node']}")
ds
```

```{python}
#| label: summary
print("=== Diagnostics terminés ===")
print(f"  Période      : {DIAG_START} à {DIAG_END}")
print(f"  Noeuds       : {n_nodes}")
print(f"  Pas de temps : {n_diag_days}")
print(f"  Export        : {output_nc}")
```
